skills.name: bioresearch-introduction
skills.triggers: what can BioResearch Agent do / which workflow to use

skills.name: bioresearch-environment-check
skills.triggers: validate environment / troubleshoot a failed run

skills.name: bioresearch-literature-analysis
skills.triggers: literature review / research-gap analysis / PubMed synthesis

skills.name: bioresearch-biomarker-discovery
skills.triggers: find gene biomarkers / candidates for a disease

skills.name: bioresearch-causal-inference
skills.triggers: causal effect / MR between exposure and outcome

skills.name: bioresearch-disease-case-study
skills.capability: Real-data disease case study + blind benchmark (known-gene recovery / pathway sanity / reproducibility)
skills.triggers: disease case study / validation run / benchmark the workflows on real data

skills.name: bioresearch-causal-evidence
skills.triggers: causal evidence / colocalization / TWAS / fine-mapping / which gene drives a GWAS locus

skills.name: bioresearch-agent-router
skills.capability: Rule-based intent classification -> workflow (literature/biomarker/causal/case-study/doctor); deterministic, no LLM
skills.triggers: classify / route a free-text research intent to the right workflow

planned.name: bioresearch-workflow-orchestration
planned.note: No automated orchestrator CLI yet; framework stages 9–12 are conceptual, not implemented.
